programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Middle-aged real estate investor finds young love and steals client money to impress his new bride.

programme.title: America's Next Investment
programme.desc: America's Next Investment: Exploring Opportunities in AI,Tech, Real Estate, Alcohol, Cannabis, and More. Tune in to discover how to invest!

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage. Join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: American Greed: Deadly Rich
programme.desc: Living a golden life, entrepreneurs James and Pamela Fayed turn a fledgling coin company into a gold trading empire; after Pamela is brutally stabbed to death, her murder case reveals a federal fraud investigation and a marriage filled with lies.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: A husband comes under suspicion after the disappearance of his wife.

programme.title: American Greed: Deadly Rich
programme.desc: When a wealthy Texas retiree is found dead in a ravine in Mexico, all eyes turn to his young boyfriend, a porn actor; while investigators uncover the truth behind their relationship, border crossing records provide the key to solving the case.

programme.title: How to Get Your Money Right
programme.desc: Award-winning journalist and civil rights acitivist Dr. Benjamin F. Chavis Jr. talks about how to deal with business, banking and market by exploring the latest concepts and strategies for personal economic growth.

programme.title: How to Get Your Money Right
programme.desc: Award-winning journalist and civil rights acitivist Dr. Benjamin F. Chavis Jr. talks about how to deal with business, banking and market by exploring the latest concepts and strategies for personal economic growth.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Pocket Hose Copper Head - see why 50 million sold
programme.desc: Join TV legend Richard Karn to discover the strongest, smartest Pocket Hose yet! The Copper Head™ features anti-burst technology, a kink-proof Force Field jacket, Tri-Tex inner tube and game-changing Pocket Pivot™ for 360° freedom.

programme.title: The Fine Art Auction - Live!
programme.desc: Bid on works from the masters to modern contemporary art, all at unbelievable auction prices!

programme.title: 1800's CC Treasures
programme.desc: Add the stunning set of 2 1881 and 1885 Carson City Silver Morgan Dollar in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection. These epic rare silver coins have miniscule mintages of 296,000 and 228,000 respectively.

programme.title: Mercy Ships
programme.desc: Mercy Ship's crew of world class medical volunteers sail across the globe providing lifesaving surgeries to those with nowhere else to turn.

programme.title: Iconic Silver Set
programme.desc: Secure a complete 2025 Set of the iconic Morgan and Peace Silver Dollars, struck from .999 pure silver! This set contains 2 of each coin in Mint State, Proof, and Reverse Proof 70 condition with each mintage among the lowest of the modern series!

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the Set of 20 Truly Historic Morgan Silver Dollars in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection today. With only about 1% of all Morgan Dollars grading in uncirculated condition, examples like these are Condition Rarities.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Rare 1920's Silver
programme.desc: Add a 10-Coin or 20-Coin Roll of the iconic Peace Silver Dollars from 1922-1925 in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your collection. Honoring the peace achieved after WWI, these Classic American Silver coins boast historical significance.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: 1776 USA Gold Rarity
programme.desc: Secure a 1oz Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM in a 1 of 250 Holder, honoring 250 years of American Freedom! Included as a bonus is a free 2026 1oz Silver Eagle also featuring the iconic Liberty Bell to create a one of a kind pair!

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A healthy, hydrating treat for thirsty dogs; a convenient portable outdoor fire; a tree-made product; a healthy meal concept; an update on Benjilock.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A modern phone booth design; an unconventional dessert concept; a device helps take condiments on the go; a portable office furniture design; an update on Cup Board Pro, a two-sided bamboo cutting board.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A gadget designed to safely and quickly get children in and out of a car; a lower-cost computer for kids; a data-driven approach to skin care; a device created to bring a robot revolution to children's education; Anne Wojcicki guest sharks.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A portable basketball shooting machine; no-bake and nutritious snacks; an instant sneaker cleaner; an all-in-one beer-making device; an update on Boost, a portable oxygen canister company; guest Shark Alex Rodriguez.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Cosmetics to help clear up imperfections; a water sports apparel brand; a product designed to keep dogs hydrated during any excursion; a solution to drinking a beverage while fishing; an update on Doughp.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Pitches include a twist on the traditional ice cream cone, a gadget to help control a cellphone safely while on the move, an app for travel enthusiasts and innovative winter equipment; update on Bee Sweet Lemonade.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A piece of history delivered; a virtual theme park experience; eco-friendly plantable pots; a culturally unique greeting card.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Customizable ski poles; all-natural lip balms; at-home sugaring hair removal kits; a line of oat-based doughnuts; Kendra Scott guest judges.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A robotic burger vending machine; bespoke hats that display hometown pride; customizable footwear; a resistance band to develop the perfect jump shot; guest shark Michael Rubin.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A healthy, hydrating treat for thirsty dogs; a convenient portable outdoor fire; a tree-made product; a healthy meal concept; an update on Benjilock.
